allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.includes\('Git'\) || k.includes\('Linked'\) || k.includes\('Link'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k === 'Download' || k === 'ArrowUpRight' || k === 'ExternalLink'\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const k = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(x => x === 'Sun' || x === 'Moon'\); console.log\(k.join\(', '\)\)")
